results.name: specimen: is a full HTML document
specimen: one card per direction
specimen: embeds the provided @font-face
specimen: tags role elements with their primary face
specimen: registers all faces for the render check
specimen: includes the width-diff render check (not fonts.check)
specimen: RENDER_CHECK_JS export is embedded
specimen: applies the project palette
specimen: uses the direction's font stack on the headline
specimen: shows a parity badge when provided
specimen: escapes untrusted direction names (no raw <b>)
specimen: references no network font CDN itself (offline)
specimen: array faceCss is newline-joined (both @font-face survive)
specimen: empty directions still render a valid doc
preview: writes .font-lab/preview.html
preview: works on a non-Next framework (tanstack-start)
preview: bundles the picked + role fonts
preview: emits @font-face for the picked display
preview: picks up the project palette (accent #ff3b30)
preview: is self-contained (no CDN fetch in the HTML)
preview: works on Vite
preview: available even on a non-shippable (non-Tailwind) project
engine: exports previewSpecimen + screenshotSpecimen
specimen: labels stock copy + signposts the real-site preview
specimen: no stock-copy label when project copy is present
preview: a Vite project's own copy reaches the sheet
preview: no stock-copy label when the project's words were found
paintPlan: display paints the heading voice with its parity stack
paintPlan: body→body, mono→label (the panel's own voice map)
paintPlan: a family with no built stack stays null (reported, never faked)
